title: David
html:
Long-standing close friend Yahir checks in with regularly across the entire corpus (2018 → 2026). One of the load-bearing male friendships along with Dave (the friend who died), ayden, victor ruiz. Recurs as "call david", "david package", "david graduation" — small-frequency check-ins that mark the relationship as one of the few Yahir actively maintains.

Disambiguation note. "David" and "Dave" are likely different people — see the Dave eulogy for the friend who died in Oct 2024. This page tracks David, the still-active friendship.

TL;DR

  • 27 inbound citations spanning 8 years — among the longest-lived friendships documented in the vault.
  • Recurs primarily as action items ("call david", "david package", "send david package") rather than reflective passages — the friendship operates through frequency, not depth-on-page.
  • Featured in the Peru trip and Cusco bus ride — possibly travel partner / host for the Peru chapter.
  • Surfaces in graduation context (2025 05 13 for graduation) — David is one of the graduation-rite witnesses.
  • Crosses into family-context summaries (2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state, 2023 05 08 dad as monster dream) — meaning David is one of the friends Yahir lets into the dad-cluster grief.

Key facts

  • Sustained presence 2018 → 2026. 2018 07 28 542638062 is the earliest reference; 2025 05 30 todos is recent. Eight years of active maintenance.
  • Peru trip companion. 2021 07 29 LIMA CUSCO and 2021 08 26 bus ride to cusco place David in the Peru context.
  • Package logistics. 2022 07 21 david package electricity fixed fee / 2022 07 21 send david package — Yahir is sending physical things (gifts? equipment?) — relationship-maintenance through objects.
  • OSU-era proximate. 2021 05 16 osu housing owen, 2021 08 11 fall todo cluster, 2022 09 25 get contacts ordered — David is in the OSU social orbit.
  • Trusted with the heavy stuff. 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state / 2023 05 08 dad as monster dream include David in the dad-cluster context.
  • Birthday/graduation ritual. 2025 05 13 for graduation — David on the witness list.

Chronological arc

  • 2018–2020 — early friendship establishment (2018 07 28 542638062, 2020 12 31 jan 15 college app).
  • 2021 — peak co-presence (Peru trip + OSU housing + summer todos).
  • 2022 — package-and-call era (2022 07 21 david package electricity fixed fee, 2022 11 20 thoughts on 112022).
  • 2023–2024 — heavier-context inclusion (2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state, 2023 05 08 dad as monster dream, 2024 02 15 thoughts and things 2142024).
  • 2025 — graduation rite + ongoing todos (2025 05 13 for graduation, 2025 05 30 todos).

Source summaries

  • 2025 05 30 todos — recent recurring "call david"
  • 2025 05 13 for graduation — graduation witness
  • 2021 07 29 LIMA CUSCO — Peru chapter
  • 2022 07 21 david package electricity fixed fee
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state
  • 2023 05 08 dad as monster dream
  • 2021 05 16 osu housing owen
  • 2024 01 01 2023 year recap
  • 2022 11 20 thoughts on 112022
  • 2018 07 28 542638062 — earliest mention

Plus ~17 additional check-in / todo summaries.

Connections

  • Dave — separate friend (died 2024); 2021 07 29 my guy dave / 2024 10 16 dave eulogy
  • ayden · victor ruiz — peer male friendships
  • corvallis or · osu — shared geographic context
  • grants pass teen era — possible original meeting context
  • people across multiple projects (query) — surfaces this entity
